title: Bandra Vehicle Theft Ring
description: Six high-end vehicles stolen from Bandra West residential lanes over 12 days. All vehicles were SUVs. Thefts occurred between 2 AM and 4 AM. No alarms triggered, suggesting relay attack on keyless entry systems. One witness reported a white van parked nearby on multiple nights.
modus_operandi: Organised ring, relay attack on keyless entry, targeting high-value SUVs, late night operation, support vehicle used.

suspects.description: Male, seen driving white Tempo Traveller, stocky, short hair

evidence.description: White van seen parked on 3 of the 6 theft nights
Toll plaza camera captured stolen SUV on Western Express Highway at 4:30 AM
White Tempo Traveller partial plate MH-01 identified near scene

blind_spots: Relay attack equipment not flagged as MO until day 9
Toll plaza footage not pulled for 5 days
No cross-check with vehicle theft rings operating in Thane and Navi Mumbai
resolution: Toll camera led to chop shop in Bhiwandi. Ring of 4 arrested. 5 of 6 vehicles recovered.
